test.create_query: CREATE TABLE tab_src (text String) ENGINE = Memory;
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO tab_src SELECT arrayStringConcat(arrayMap(x -> if(x % 3 = 0, ['the', 'a', 'of', 'to', 'in', 'and', 'is', 'it'][(x % 8) + 1], toString(cityHash64(number, x) % 100000)), range(30)), ' ') FROM numbers(3000000);
test.query: INSERT INTO tab_filter SELECT * FROM tab_src
